extract: Castform (Japanese: ポワルン Powalen) is a Normal-type Pokémon introduced in Generation III. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Castform changes forms with its Forecast Ability depending on the current weather. During any weather not listed below or outside of battle, Castform is in its Normal form and is Normal-type. During harsh sunlight, Castform is in its Sunny Form and is Fire-type. During rain, Castform is in its Rainy Form and is Water-type. During hail, Castform is in its Snowy Form and is Ice-type. (Refer to Game data→Form data for more details.)
